subject: GeneralKnowledge
title: GeneralKnowledge Test - 14
description: A mix of fun and educational questions covering animals, geography, science, community, and health for Grade 4 students.

questions.q: Which animal is known for having a long neck and eating leaves from tall trees?
questions.explanation: Giraffes have very long necks that allow them to reach high branches that other animals cannot.
questions.hint: They have unique brown and tan patterns.
questions.objective: Identify common animals and their physical traits.

questions.q: What is the capital of Canada?
questions.explanation: Ottawa is the capital city of Canada.
questions.hint: It is located in the province of Ontario.

questions.q: Which part of a plant makes seeds?
questions.explanation: Flowers are the parts of plants that are responsible for reproduction and seed production.
questions.hint: They are usually colorful and smell nice.

questions.q: What is the hardest natural substance known to man?
questions.explanation: Diamonds are made of pure carbon and are the hardest known natural mineral.
questions.hint: It is a very precious stone.

questions.q: Which of these is a healthy habit for your body?
questions.explanation: Getting enough sleep is vital for your brain and body to grow and stay healthy.
questions.hint: It is what you do at night.

questions.q: What do we call a person who flies an airplane?
questions.explanation: A pilot is a person who operates the flying controls of an aircraft.

questions.q: Which planet is closest to the Sun?
questions.explanation: Mercury is the smallest and closest planet to the Sun.
questions.hint: It has a name like a Roman messenger god.
questions.objective: Understand facts about the solar system.

questions.q: Which of these is a primary color?
questions.explanation: Yellow, red, and blue are the three primary colors.
questions.hint: It is the color of a lemon.

questions.q: What is the force that pulls things down to Earth?
questions.explanation: Gravity is the force that attracts a body toward the center of the earth.

questions.q: Which of these is a community helper who keeps us safe?
questions.explanation: Police officers are responsible for maintaining public order and safety.
questions.hint: They wear a uniform and carry a badge.
